title: cardamomum dealbatum
intro: Cardamomum dealbatum, also known as the Lesser Cardamom or Malabar Cardamom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cardamomum dealbatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea and vomiting, and relieve symptoms of colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
